utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. However, the required format specifies that each coverage item must include descriptions (e.g., physical and mental health insurance with costs; home/contents insurance with costs; travel insurance with costs; any enhancement services with costs; total budget with complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). The provided plan only lists numeric costs for each category without any policy details or breakdown, and the total budget is a single number without monthly/annual breakdown. Therefore, none of the items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists budget allocations by category rather than specific plan names. We must match these amounts to the ground-truth options that have the same monthly_costs within each category. Health coverage at 330 corresponds to combining physical health (200 or 210) and mental health (130 or 120). The only exact sum is 210 + 120 = 330, which maps to EliteCare Premium Plan (physical) and EliteCare Premium Plan (mental). Property coverage at 90 matches PrimeHome Premium Coverage (90). Travel coverage at 115 matches PrimeTravel Premium Plan (115). Additional services at 30 aligns with property enhancement services having a 30/month option; the matching named option at 30 is Home Security System Discount (30).
